footerItems.name: Address
footerItems.label: No. 383, Zhongshan Rd., Luzhu Dist., Kaohsiung City 821012, Taiwan

home.title:
Professional Support 
for Animal Health
home.description: Established in 1973, Lian Hua Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. specializes in the research, development, and manufacturing of veterinary pharmaceuticals. With over half a century of expertise and technical innovation, Lian Hua remains steadfast in its commitment to Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) standards. Our rigorous operational protocols ensure consistent product quality, providing the livestock industry with safe and dependable medical solutions.

services.title: Service Intro
services.description: Driven by our core values of "Innovative R&D, Professional Service, Superior Quality, and Integrity," we strive for sustainable growth. Leveraging our proprietary SGP manufacturing technology, we offer a diverse range of high-efficacy products designed to safeguard animal health and elevate the standards of care across the livestock sector.

services.title: Essential Prescriptions & OTC Solutions
services.description:
With over a hundred essential prescriptions and over-the-counter (OTC) medications, our product line encompasses a diverse range of dosage forms:

• Injections & Suspensions
• Dry Powder Injections & Dry Powder Suspensions
• Soluble Powders & Oral Liquids
• External Disinfectants
• Medicated Feed Additives & Feed Supplements

services.title: Looking ahead
services.description: Looking ahead, Lian Hua and our management team will continue to advance product innovation and manufacturing excellence. By enhancing overall quality, we remain dedicated to creating lasting value for the livestock industry, consumers, and society as a whole.

products.name: COUGHTIN POWDER
products.indications:
Livestock: For the treatment of acute and chronic bronchitis, pneumonia, and coughing, expectoration, or asthma caused by the common cold.
Chicken & Turkey (Excluding laying hens): Symptomatic treatment of Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), Infectious Coryza, influenza, and Infectious Bronchitis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 2–3 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 17 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: OTC 500
products.indications:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of infections caused by bacteria sensitive to Oxytetracycline, such as Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), Infectious Coryza, and bacterial diarrhea.
Swine: Treatment of infections caused by bacteria sensitive to Oxytetracycline, such as bacterial enteritis and bacterial pneumonia.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 200 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water (1:5000 dilution). Administer consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 3 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: DOXYLLIN 200
products.indications:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of respiratory and urinary tract infections, such as Colibacillosis, Fowl Cholera, Infectious Coryza, and Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD).
Swine: Treatment of Colibacillosis, Polyarthritis, and Mycoplasmal Pneumonia (Enzootic Pneumonia).
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 250 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water (1:4000 dilution). Administer consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 3 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: ERYTHROMYCIN 500 Water Soluble Powder
products.indications: Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), Infectious Coryza, and Synovitis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 200 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Drug Resistance: Incomplete cross-resistance may occur between this product and other macrolide antibiotics.
Withdrawal Period: 5 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.
Do not use this product for more than 7 consecutive days.

products.name: ERYMYCIN C
products.indications: Chicken & Turkey (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of respiratory and digestive tract diseases. Also used to alleviate respiratory complications caused by stress from vaccination, debeaking, or transportation.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 1 kg of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 3 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 24 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 7 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: AMPIDICLOX Pow.
products.indications: Swine & Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), Infectious Coryza, Staphylococcosis, Colibacillosis, pneumonia, and other respiratory tract infections.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Dissolve 1 kg of this product in 1,000 liters of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 2–3 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 7 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: AMOCILLIN 200
products.indications:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Colibacillosis, Salmonellosis, bacterial diarrhea, and Infectious Coryza.
Swine: Treatment of Colibacillosis, Salmonellosis, Haemophilosis, Pasteurellosis, Atrophic Rhinitis (AR), Swine Erysipelas, abscesses, and meningitis.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Mix 500 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 2–3 days.
Swine: Administer 50 mg of this product per kg of body weight, twice daily. Mix with drinking water or administer by direct drenching. Use consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 5 days for chickens; 15 days for swine.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: AMOCILLIN 500
products.indications:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Colibacillosis, Salmonellosis, Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), Infectious Coryza, and bacterial enteritis.
Swine: Treatment of Colibacillosis, Salmonellosis, Actinobacillus Pleuropneumonia (APP), Pasteurellosis, Atrophic Rhinitis (AR), Erysipelas, abscesses, and meningitis.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Mix 100 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 2–3 days.
Swine: Administer 20 mg of this product per kg of body weight, twice daily. Mix with drinking water or administer by direct drenching. Use consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 5 days for chickens; 15 days for swine.
Treatment Duration: Continue treatment for at least 48 hours until symptoms disappear; however, do not exceed 7 days of use.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.packaging:
500 g / Bag
1 kg / Bag
20 kg / Bag

products.name: CEPHA Powder
products.indications:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Infectious Coryza, bronchitis, Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), and Staphylococcosis.
Swine: Treatment of bacterial pneumonia, Pasteurellosis (Swine Plague), Swine Erysipelas, endometritis, and puerperal fever.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 300–600 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 2 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: PEXIN
products.indications:
Swine: Removal of Ascaris (roundworms) and Oesophagostomum (nodular worms).
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Removal of Ascaris (roundworms) and Heterakis (cecal worms).
Cattle & Sheep: Removal of Ascaris (roundworms).
Horse: Removal of Ascaris (roundworms) and Oxyuris (pinworms).
Dog & Cat: Removal of Ascaris (roundworms).
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Swine: 3 g of this product per 10 kg of body weight.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): 3 g of this product per 7–10 kg of body weight.
Cattle & Horse: 3–6 g of this product per 10 kg of body weight.
Sheep: 2–3 g of this product per 10 kg of body weight.
Dog & Cat: 1.5–3 g of this product per 10 kg of body weight.

precautions.precaution: Withdrawal Period: 7 days.
Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: SULDIN
products.indications: Swine: Removal and prevention of Ascaris (roundworms), Trichuris (whipworms), and Ancylostoma (hookworms).
products.dosageAndAdministration: Suckling Pigs or Piglets: Mix 60 g of this product per 100 kg of dry feed. Use consecutively for 5 days.

precautions.precaution: Withdrawal Period: 14 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Preparation: Ensure the product is thoroughly and evenly mixed into the feed.
Administering: Concomitant use with laxatives is not required.
Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.

products.name: MYCOSOL
products.indications: Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of fungal infections.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Dissolve 1 kg of this product in 500 liters of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 7–10 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in laying hens.
Preparation: Once dissolved in water, the medicated solution should be used within the same day.
Drug Interaction: Do not use this product in combination with sulfonamides.
Withdrawal Period: 7 days.

products.name: GENTAMICIN 150
products.indications:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of bacterial enteritis and diarrhea.
Swine: Treatment of bacterial enteritis, diarrhea, and swine dysentery.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 0.2 kg of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 10 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: FLORCIN 100 Pow.
products.indications:
Swine: Treatment of Actinobacillus Pleuropneumonia (APP), Pasteurella pneumonia, Salmonellosis, Colibacillosis, and other infections caused by bacteria sensitive to Florfenicol.
Mule Ducks (Excluding laying ducks): Treatment of Riemerella anatipestifer infections in waterfowl.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Swine: Mix 0.2–0.4 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed, or administer 0.01–0.02 g of this product per kg of body weight (equivalent to 1–2 mg of Florfenicol).
Mule Ducks (Excluding laying ducks): Administer 0.4 g of this product per kg of body weight (equivalent to 40 mg of Florfenicol) once daily for 5 consecutive days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Treatment Duration: Do not exceed 7 consecutive days of treatment.
Withdrawal Period: 3 days for swine; 14 days for mule ducks.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: THIALORCIN 250
products.indications: Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Infectious Coryza and Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD).
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 400–2,000 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water (equivalent to 100–500 ppm of Thiamphenicol). Administer consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 3 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: FLUMEQUINE 500
products.indications:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Colibacillosis, Infectious Coryza, and Salmonellosis.
Perciformes (Perch-like fish): Treatment of infections caused by sensitive Photobacterium, Aeromonas hydrophila group, Pseudomonas fluorescens, or Edwardsiella.
Anguilliformes (Eel-like fish): Treatment of infections caused by sensitive Aeromonas hydrophila group, Pseudomonas fluorescens, or Edwardsiella.
Testudines (Turtles & Terrapins): Treatment of infections caused by sensitive Aeromonas hydrophila.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water: Use 200 g for chicks (1–15 days old); 300 g for 4-week-old chickens; 400 g for adult chickens.
Perciformes & Anguilliformes: Oral administration. Use 40 mg of this product per kg of body weight daily for 3–5 consecutive days.
Testudines: Oral administration. Use 40 mg of this product per kg of body weight daily for 5 consecutive days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 7 days for chickens; 8 days for Perciformes; 20 days for Anguilliformes; 32 days for Testudines.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Treatment Duration: For Perciformes, Anguilliformes, and Testudines, do not exceed 7 consecutive days of use.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: COMPLEX LEUKOPYCORIN K
products.indications: Swine & Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Leucocytozoonosis in chickens and Toxoplasmosis in swine.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): For Leucocytozoonosis, mix 1 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed. Do not exceed 7 consecutive days of use.
豬Swine: For Toxoplasmosis, mix 2–3 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed. Do not exceed 7 consecutive days of use.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 14 days.
Usage Restrictions: This product must not be used as a coccidiostat (anti-coccidial agent).
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: COLIVARIN Soluble
products.indications:
Livestock: Treatment of white scours and dysentery in suckling pigs; diarrhea caused by feed changes or sudden climate shifts; and Colibacillosis.
Chicken & Turkey (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Salmonellosis, Colibacillosis, and Infectious Serositis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Dissolve 1 kg of this product in 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 10 days.
Storage: Store in a dark, cool place, away from light and direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: COCCIDIOCIDESOL
products.indications: Livestock, Chicken & Turkey (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of various types of coccidiosis, Fowl Cholera, and Vibrionic Hepatitis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Dissolve 1 kg of this product in 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 3 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 7 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: CS3 Soluble
products.indications: Chicken & Turkey (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of various types of coccidiosis, Fowl Cholera, Pullorum disease, Fowl Typhoid, and Vibrionic Hepatitis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Dissolve 1 kg of this product in 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 2–3 days.

precautions.precaution: Withdrawal Period: 5 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: LICOCCIDE 600
products.indications: Chicken & Turkey (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of coccidiosis and Salmonellosis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 500 g of this product (equivalent to 300 g of Sulfachloropyrazine Sodium Monohydrate) per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 3 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 10 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: DIMETHOPRIM
products.indications: Chicken & Turkey (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Colibacillosis, Infectious Coryza, Staphylococcosis, pneumonia, and enteritis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Treatment: Dissolve 1–2 g of this product per 10 liters of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 2–3 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 15 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: TRIDIAZINE 480
products.indications:
Cattle, Sheep, & Swine: Treatment of respiratory, digestive, and genitourinary tract infections caused by bacteria sensitive to this product.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of coccidiosis and respiratory/digestive tract infections caused by bacteria sensitive to this product.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Method: Oral administration.
Cattle: Administer 10–15 g per head.
Sheep: Administer 2 g per head.
Swine: Administer 30 mg per kg of body weight.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Mix 250 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Withdrawal Period: 21 days for meat use; 4 days for milk use.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: TOMEGIN 500
products.indications:
Swine: Treatment of Toxoplasmosis, bacterial enteritis, pneumonia, and Atrophic Rhinitis (AR).
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Infectious Coryza, Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), coccidiosis, and Leucocytozoonosis.
Cattle: Treatment of bacterial mastitis and endometritis.
Horse: Treatment of bacterial pneumonia.
Dog & Cat: Treatment of bacterial enteritis.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Cattle: 40–60 mg per kg of body weight.
Horse: 20–60 mg per kg of body weight.
Swine: 80–200 mg per kg of body weight.
Dog & Cat: 100–200 mg per kg of body weight.
Note: Administer orally once daily. From the second day onwards, reduce the dosage by half.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Mix 2 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Treatment Duration: Do not exceed 7 consecutive days of use. If necessary, it may be used in combination with corticosteroids such as Dexamethasone or Prednisolone.
Withdrawal Period: 15 days for cattle, swine, and chickens.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: TYLOSIN 500
products.indications: Chicken & Swine: Treatment of infections caused by Gram-positive bacteria and other sensitive organisms, such as swine dysentery, Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD) in chickens, and Mycoplasma infections.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Chicken: Mix 1.0 kg of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 1–5 days.
Swine: Mix 0.5 kg of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 1–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Drug Resistance: Incomplete cross-resistance may occur between this product and Erythromycin.
Withdrawal Period: 5 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: AIVALOSIN 50
products.indications:
Swine: Treatment of Enzootic Pneumonia, Mycoplasmal arthritis, and rhinitis.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD), Mycoplasma, Staphylococcus, and Streptococcus infections.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Swine & Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Mix 0.4–1.0 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed. Administer consecutively for 5–7 days depending on the severity of the condition.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 3 days for swine; 5 days for chickens.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in laying hens.

products.name: TILMICOSIN 200
products.indications: Swine: Treatment of pneumonia caused by Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae, Mycoplasma hyopneumoniae, Pasteurella multocida (Hemorrhagic Septicemia), and other bacteria sensitive to Tilmicosin.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 2 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed (equivalent to 400 g of active Tilmicosin potency). Administer consecutively for 14 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Drug Interaction: Do not combine this product with feed containing Bentonite.
Withdrawal Period: 14 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: LINCOCIN 400
products.indications: Swine & Broilers: Treatment of swine dysentery and necrotic enteritis in broilers.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Swine: Mix 138.9 g of this product (equivalent to 55.6 g of Lincomycin) per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Continue treatment for at least 5 days after symptoms disappear; do not exceed 10 consecutive days.
Broilers: Mix 42.3 g of this product (equivalent to 16.9 g of Lincomycin) per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 7 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 4 days for swine; 3 days for broilers.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in laying hens, breeder hens, or swine weighing over 250 lbs.
Contraindications: Strictly prohibited for use in rabbits, guinea pigs, horses, and ruminants.
Treatment Monitoring: If symptoms of dysentery (watery, mucoid, or bloody diarrhea) do not improve after 2 days of treatment in swine, discontinue use.

當Side Effects: Swine may experience soft stools, diarrhea, or anal swelling during treatment. These symptoms typically resolve spontaneously within 5–8 days and do not require discontinuation of the medication.
Drug Interaction: Do not use concurrently with Erythromycin.
Drug Resistance: Incomplete cross-resistance may occur between this product and some macrolide antibiotics.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: SPECTLIN 220
products.indications: Swine: Treatment of dysentery, bacterial enteritis, bacterial diarrhea, and mycoplasmal pneumonia.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 200–500 g of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 1 day.
Side Effects: Swine may occasionally experience soft stools within 36 hours of use. This symptom typically resolves spontaneously within 5–8 days and do not require discontinuation of the medication.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: TIAMULIN 200
products.indications:
Swine: Treatment of mycoplasmal pneumonia and swine dysentery.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD) and Infectious Coryza.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Swine (Dysentery): Mix 0.3–0.5 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed. Administer consecutively for 3–6 days.
Swine (Mycoplasmal Pneumonia): Mix 1.0 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed. Administer consecutively for 5–7 days.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Mix 2.0–2.5 kg of this product per 1,000 kg (1 ton) of feed. Administer consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Drug Interaction: Do not combine this product with ionophore antibiotics such as Monensin, Narasin, or Salinomycin.
Withdrawal Period: 7 days.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: COLISTIN 120
products.indications: Calf, Swine, Broilers, Turkey & Laying Hens: Treatment of digestive tract infections caused by Colistin-sensitive E. coli or Salmonella.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Calf & Swine: Dissolve in drinking water. Administer 42–50 mg of this product per kg of body weight daily for 5–7 consecutive days.
Broilers, Turkey & Laying Hens: Dissolve in drinking water. Administer 50 mg of this product per kg of body weight daily for 5–7 consecutive days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Contraindications: Do not combine with Polymyxin (due to antagonism). Do not use in animals with severe renal impairment.
Drug Interaction: Avoid mixing with Aminoglycosides.
Withdrawal Period: 3 days for calves, swine, broilers, turkeys, and laying hens.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: DOXYLLIN 500
products.indications: Broilers: Treatment of Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD) caused by Mycoplasma gallisepticum.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Mix 0.1–0.2 g of this product per liter of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.
Withdrawal Period: 7 days.
Preparation: Prepare fresh medicated water daily; replace every 24 hours.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children.

products.name: URICOSURIC powder
products.indications: Dog & Cat: Treatment of Uricosuria (Urate urolithiasis) and gouty arthritis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Administer 100–300 mg of this product per kg of body weight. Use consecutively for 1 week.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: DOXYCYCLINE
products.indications: Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD).
products.dosageAndAdministration: Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Dissolve 100 g of this product in 100 liters of drinking water. Administer consecutively for 3–5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 5 days.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
